security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https://fonts.googleapis.com https://world.openfoodfacts.org; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://world.openfoodfacts.org https://world.openbeautyfacts.org; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'

bundle.longDescription: Electronic pharmacy management system for Bunun Mazen Pharmacy.

updater._pubkey_notice: BEFORE RELEASE: run 'npm run tauri signer generate -- -w ~/.tauri/pharmacy-updater.key' then paste the PUBLIC key below. Keep the private key file SECRET. Set TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY env var during 'tauri build' for signed updates.
